expectations.evidence: Line 27: 'Fetal presentation: Cephalic (confirmed by abdominal palpation)'

expectations.text: Birth preparedness and complication readiness counseled
expectations.evidence: Lines 50-56: 'Birth preparedness and complication readiness (reinforce)' covering delivery facility confirmation, transport plan, birth companion, packed bag, emergency savings, and emergency contacts.
Lines 67-71: 'Breastfeeding counseling' covering early initiation within 1 hour, exclusive breastfeeding for 6 months, positioning and attachment techniques, and common challenges.
